description: Catalog of standard legal agreement templates curated from Common Paper's public GitHub repositories. Each template is stored as a markdown file in the templates/ directory.

templates.name: AI Addendum
templates.description: Common Paper standard AI Addendum, supplementing an existing agreement to cover the use of AI services, input/output rights, and related restrictions.

templates.name: Business Associate Agreement (BAA)
templates.description: Common Paper standard Business Associate Agreement, used to address HIPAA obligations between a covered entity and a business associate handling protected health information.

templates.name: Cloud Service Agreement (CSA)
templates.description: Common Paper standard Cloud Service Agreement governing the provision and use of a cloud-based software product or service.

templates.name: Data Processing Agreement (DPA)
templates.description: Common Paper standard Data Processing Agreement covering the processing of personal data and related privacy/data protection obligations between controller and processor.

templates.name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement (Cover Page)
templates.description: Cover page for the Common Paper Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement, capturing the deal-specific details that accompany the standard terms.

templates.name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement (Standard Terms)
templates.description: Standard terms of the Common Paper Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement, protecting confidential information exchanged between two parties.

templates.name: Partnership Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Partnership Agreement governing a referral, reseller, or other commercial partnership between two companies.

templates.name: Pilot Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Pilot Agreement for a time-limited trial or proof-of-concept evaluation of a product or service.

templates.name: Software License Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Software License Agreement governing the licensing of on-premise or downloadable software.

templates.name: Design Partner Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Design Partner Agreement for collaborating with an early customer on the development and feedback of a new product.

templates.name: Professional Services Agreement (PSA)
templates.description: Common Paper standard Professional Services Agreement governing the delivery of professional or consulting services, typically via statements of work.

templates.name: Service Level Agreement (SLA)
templates.description: Common Paper standard Service Level Agreement defining service availability commitments, support response times, and related remedies.
